themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "What does the loss of inheritance signify about broken covenant promises and displaced hope?".
